blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Watch rule creation is currently failing on the live backend with HTTP 500, so create/update rule behavior cannot be validated successfully.
Custom watch rule updates also fail with HTTP 500, leaving the rules list empty.
Invalid custom-rule input is not surfaced as a contract-level 400; the backend returns HTTP 500 instead.
Rule deletion cannot be validated because rule creation never succeeded; delete attempts return 404 not found.

appliedUpdates.description: Added flow validator guidance sections for API and integrated web+API validators, including shared service and isolation boundaries.
Documented effective web-validation limitation: agent-browser cannot launch in this environment because Chromium is missing libasound.so.2 and dependency install requires interactive sudo.
